message:
feat(web): add cost estimation badges to prompt cards

- Add CostBadge component using core cost estimation utilities
- Display estimated cost next to token counts in PromptCard
- Add cost badge to PromptDetailModal header section
- Uses gpt-4o-mini pricing as default model

Part of bd-2auv (Pro Cost Estimator feature)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
